title: Skip gate pass when already passed at HEAD
description:
Skip re-running a gate's (often expensive) checker when it already passed at the current HEAD commit.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `jit gate pass <id> <gate>` on a gate already passed for the current HEAD exits `0` without re-running the checker and reports `already_passed: true` in `--json`.
- [ ] `--force` re-runs the checker unconditionally.

## Notes

Depends on T4. Plan task T5.
